title: safety_annotation SSE Event
description: Carries safety-layer annotations about a model response: groundedness scores, citation verification status, and content-policy actions. Used by the SpaarkeAi safety perimeter (FR-801). The client renders safety badges and may suppress or replace content based on the action field.

severity.description: Severity level. 'info' = logged only; 'warning' = displayed to user; 'blocked' = content suppressed.

category.description: The safety category that triggered this annotation.

affectedSegment.description: Optional text segment within the response that triggered the annotation.

action.description: Action taken by the safety layer. 'logged' = no UI change; 'filtered' = segment redacted; 'blocked' = entire response suppressed.

userMessage.description: Safe, user-facing message to display when action='filtered' or action='blocked'. Must not contain details that could help an attacker refine a jailbreak.

groundedness.description: Present when category='groundedness'. Contains ungrounded segments and an overall score.

score.description: Overall groundedness score (1.0 = fully grounded in source documents).

ungroundedSegments.description: List of response segments that could not be grounded in source documents.

citations.description: Present when category='groundedness'. Citation verification breakdown.

verified.description: Citation IDs that were successfully verified against source documents.

unverified.description: Citation IDs that could not be located in any source document.

partial.description: Citation IDs where only part of the claimed content was found.

confidence.description: Overall model confidence in this safety assessment.
